category_sources: source_facts.description says Speex is an audio codec designed for speech; official speex.org overview describes an open-source patent-free audio compression format for speech.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is speex; official speex.org page brands the project as Speex.
docs_sources: Official speex.org navigation links to a dedicated Documentation page with manual and API reference links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Xiph/GitHub mirror states development happens at gitlab.xiph.org/xiph/speex.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies speech audio codec; source_facts.executables lists speexenc and speexdec command-line tools; official speex.org identifies Xiph/Speex.
